title: ferrotorch-core: irfftn / hfft / ihfft strict-Hermitian rejection — surfaced by phase 2.7 (#769)
description:
ferray-fft's irfftn/hfft/ihfft helpers panic with 'Imaginary parts of both first and last values were non-zero' when the input spectrum is not perfectly Hermitian-symmetric. PyTorch's torch.fft.irfftn / hfft / ihfft accept any complex input and silently project to the Hermitian subspace.
Source: /home/doll/.cargo/registry/.../ferray-fft-0.3.0/src/nd.rs:466.
Affected fixtures: cpu_irfftn, cpu_irfftn_differentiable, cpu_ihfft_differentiable.
Mitigation in phase 2.7 conformance: cascade_skip applied for these ops.
